lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਕੀ ਸਰਨੀ ਪਰੀਐ ਚਰਣ ਰੇਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਬਾਛੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: saadhasangat kee saranee pareeai charan ren man baachhai |1|
lines.english: I have sought the Sanctuary of the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy; my mind longs for the dust of their Feet. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੁਗਤਿ ਨ ਜਾਨਾ ਗੁਨੁ ਨਹੀ ਕੋਈ ਮਹਾ ਦੁਤਰੁ ਮਾਇ ਆਛੈ ॥
lines.translit: jugat na jaanaa gun nahee koee mahaa dutar maae aachhai |
lines.english: I do not know the way, and I have no virtue. It is so difficult to escape from Maya!

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਇ ਪਇਓ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰ ਚਰਨੀ ਤਉ ਉਤਰੀ ਸਗਲ ਦੁਰਾਛੈ ॥੨॥੨॥੨੮॥
lines.translit: aae peo naanak gur charanee tau utaree sagal duraachhai |2|2|28|
lines.english: Nanak has come and fallen at the Guru's feet; all of his evil inclinations have vanished. ||2||2||28||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤਾ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਬਚਨ ਤੁਹਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: amritaa pria bachan tuhaare |
lines.english: O Beloved, Your Words are Ambrosial Nectar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਵਗੰਧਾਰੀ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: devagandhaaree 5 |
lines.english: Dayv-Gandhaaree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਤਿ ਸੁੰਦਰ ਮਨਮੋਹਨ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਸਭਹੂ ਮਧਿ ਨਿਰਾਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: at sundar manamohan piaare sabhahoo madh niraare |1| rahaau |
lines.english: O supremely beautiful Enticer, O Beloved, You are among all, and yet distinct from all. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਜੁ ਨ ਚਾਹਉ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਚਾਹਉ ਮਨਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: raaj na chaahau mukat na chaahau man preet charan kamalaare |
lines.english: I do not seek power, and I do not seek liberation. My mind is in love with Your Lotus Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਮਹੇਸ ਸਿਧ ਮੁਨਿ ਇੰਦ੍ਰਾ ਮੋਹਿ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਹੀ ਦਰਸਾਰੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: braham mahes sidh mun indraa mohi tthaakur hee darasaare |1|
lines.english: Brahma, Shiva, the Siddhas, the silent sages and Indra - I seek only the Blessed Vision of my Lord and Master's Darshan. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮਿਲੇ ਮਨੋਹਰ ਮਨੁ ਸੀਤਲ ਬਿਗਸਾਰੇ ॥੨॥੩॥੨੯॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak prabh mile manohar man seetal bigasaare |2|3|29|
lines.english: Says Nanak, I have met my Enticing Lord God; my mind is cooled and soothed - it blossoms forth in joy. ||2||3||29||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਨੁ ਦੁਆਰੈ ਆਇਓ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਸਰਨਿ ਪਰਿਓ ਸੰਤ ਹਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: deen duaarai aaeo tthaakur saran pario sant haare |
lines.english: I have come, helpless, to Your Door, O Lord Master; I am exhausted - I seek the Sanctuary of the Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਪਾਰਿ ਉਤਾਰਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: har jap sevak paar utaario |
lines.english: Meditating on the Lord, His servant swims across to salvation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਵਗੰਧਾਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: devagandhaaree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Dayv-Gandhaaree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਨ ਦਇਆਲ ਭਏ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਅਪਨੇ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਜਨਮਿ ਨਹੀ ਮਾਰਿਓ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: deen deaal bhe prabh apane bahurr janam nahee maario |1| rahaau |
lines.english: When God becomes merciful to the meek, then one does not have to suffer reincarnation, only to die again. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਮਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਹ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਰਤਨ ਜਨਮੁ ਨਹੀ ਹਾਰਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: saadhasangam gun gaavah har ke ratan janam nahee haario |
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, he sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord, and he does not lose the jewel of this human life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਇ ਬਿਖੈ ਬਨੁ ਤਰਿਆ ਕੁਲਹ ਸਮੂਹ ਉਧਾਰਿਓ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: prabh gun gaae bikhai ban tariaa kulah samooh udhaario |1|
lines.english: Singing the Glories of God, he crosses over the ocean of poison, and saves all his generations as well. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਬਸਿਆ ਰਿਦ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਗਿਰਾਸਿ ਉਚਾਰਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: charan kamal basiaa rid bheetar saas giraas uchaario |
lines.english: The Lotus Feet of the Lord abide within his heart, and with every breath and morsel of food, he chants the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਓਟ ਗਹੀ ਜਗਦੀਸੁਰ ਪੁਨਹ ਪੁਨਹ ਬਲਿਹਾਰਿਓ ॥੨॥੪॥੩੦॥
lines.translit: naanak ott gahee jagadeesur punah punah balihaario |2|4|30|
lines.english: Nanak has grasped the Support of the Lord of the Universe; again and again, he is a sacrifice to Him. ||2||4||30||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਦੇਵਗੰਧਾਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: raag devagandhaaree mahalaa 5 ghar 4 |
lines.english: Raag Dayv-Gandhaaree, Fifth Mehl, Fourth House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਥਨ ਸੁਨਾਵਨ ਗੀਤ ਨੀਕੇ ਗਾਵਨ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਧਰਤੇ ਗਾਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kathan sunaavan geet neeke gaavan man meh dharate gaar |1|
lines.english: They talk, preach, and sing their lovely songs, but within their minds, the filth of their sins remains. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਤ ਫਿਰੇ ਬਨ ਭੇਖ ਮੋਹਨ ਰਹਤ ਨਿਰਾਰ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: karat fire ban bhekh mohan rehat niraar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Some wander around the forests, wearing religious robes, but the Fascinating Lord remains distant from them. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਤਿ ਸੁੰਦਰ ਬਹੁ ਚਤੁਰ ਸਿਆਨੇ ਬਿਦਿਆ ਰਸਨਾ ਚਾਰ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: at sundar bahu chatur siaane bidiaa rasanaa chaar |2|
lines.english: They may be very beautiful, extremely clever, wise and educated, and they may speak very sweetly. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਨ ਮੋਹ ਮੇਰ ਤੇਰ ਬਿਬਰਜਿਤ ਏਹੁ ਮਾਰਗੁ ਖੰਡੇ ਧਾਰ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: maan moh mer ter bibarajit ehu maarag khandde dhaar |3|
lines.english: To forsake pride, emotional attachment, and the sense of 'mine and yours', is the path of the double-edged sword. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਨਿ ਭਵਜਲੁ ਤਰੀਅਲੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਸੰਤ ਸੰਗਾਰ ॥੪॥੧॥੩੧॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak tin bhavajal tareeale prabh kirapaa sant sangaar |4|1|31|
lines.english: Says Nanak, they alone swim across the terrifying world-ocean, who, by God's Grace, join the Society of the Saints. ||4||1||31||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਦੇਵਗੰਧਾਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: raag devagandhaaree mahalaa 5 ghar 5 |
lines.english: Raag Dayv-Gandhaaree, Fifth Mehl, Fifth House:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਪੇਖਿਓ ਰੀ ਊਚਾ ਮੋਹਨੁ ਸਭ ਤੇ ਊਚਾ ॥
lines.translit: mai pekhio ree aoochaa mohan sabh te aoochaa |
lines.english: I have seen the Lord to be on high; the Fascinating Lord is the highest of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਨ ਨ ਸਮਸਰਿ ਕੋਊ ਲਾਗੈ ਢੂਢਿ ਰਹੇ ਹਮ ਮੂਚਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aan na samasar koaoo laagai dtoodt rahe ham moochaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: No one else is equal to Him - I have made the most extensive search on this. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੋਲਿ ਨ ਤੁਲੀਐ ਮੋਲਿ ਨ ਮੁਲੀਐ ਕਤ ਪਾਈਐ ਮਨ ਰੂਚਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tol na tuleeai mol na muleeai kat paaeeai man roochaa |1|
lines.english: His weight cannot be weighed, His value cannot be estimated. How can the Enticer of the mind be obtained? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁ ਬੇਅੰਤੁ ਅਤਿ ਬਡੋ ਗਾਹਰੋ ਥਾਹ ਨਹੀ ਅਗਹੂਚਾ ॥
lines.translit: bahu beant at baddo gaaharo thaah nahee agahoochaa |
lines.english: Utterly infinite, exceedingly great, deep and unfathomable - He is lofty, beyond reach.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰੀ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਰਸ ਭੂੰਚਾ ॥੨॥੧॥੩੨॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak kirapaa karee tthaakur mil saadhoo ras bhoonchaa |2|1|32|
lines.english: Says Nanak, the Lord Master has become Merciful. Meeting the Holy Saint, I drink in the sublime essence. ||2||1||32||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੋਜ ਅਸੰਖਾ ਅਨਿਕ ਤਪੰਥਾ ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਨਹੀ ਪਹੂਚਾ ॥
lines.translit: khoj asankhaa anik tapanthaa bin gur nahee pahoochaa |
lines.english: Millions search for Him, on various paths, but without the Guru, none find Him.
